description_long: This rifle features a classic military-style design with a fixed stock and a long, slender barrel. The body is predominantly matte black, with subtle camo-like patterning visible on the stock and handguard. It has a prominent carrying handle integrated into the upper receiver, and a detachable box magazine is visible beneath the receiver. The front sight is a simple post, while the rear sight is built into the carrying handle. The muzzle is fitted with a flash hider, and the overall construction appears robust, likely made from a combination of metal and polymer materials.
description: A matte black military-style rifle with a fixed stock, carrying handle, and long barrel, featuring a flash hider and detachable box magazine.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the narrow profile of the barrel and the flash hider at the muzzle.
description_view_1: A full left-side view reveals the fixed stock, carrying handle, detachable box magazine, and the length of the barrel.
description_view_2: The rifle is viewed from the rear, highlighting the stock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
description_view_3: A full right-side view displays the same features as the left, with the stock, carrying handle, and magazine clearly visible.
